# Pathway Academy Zone

> Pathway Academy Zone is a registered Alternative Provision in Stoke-on-Trent and Staffordshire, UK, supporting young people aged 11-16 with SEMH needs, behaviour difficulties, and reintegration journeys.

## Key resources

- [Home](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/): Overview of services, statistics, programmes.
- [About Us](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/about): Mission, CARES values, leadership philosophy.
- [Programmes](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/programmes): Six core programme strands (KS3, KS4, vocational, SEMH, reintegration, transition).
- [Our Team](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/team): Educators, pastoral specialists, executives.
- [Outcomes](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/outcomes): Attendance, qualifications, destinations data.
- [Centres](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/centres): Stafford and Stoke learning centres.
- [Partners](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/partners): Schools and organisations across Staffordshire.
- [Safeguarding](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/safeguarding): Safeguarding policy, DSL, reporting routes.

## Knowledge Hub

- [Knowledge Hub](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/knowledge-hub): Index of guides, comparisons, best practice.
- [Complete Guide to Alternative Provision](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/knowledge-hub/complete-guide): Definitive 15-minute reference covering AP definition, legal framework, referral triggers, programme models, safeguarding, staffing, common mistakes, and progression.
- [Glossary](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/knowledge-hub/glossary): Definitions of AP, EHCP, SEMH, PRU, SENCO, etc.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/contact): Phone 01782 365365, email info@pathwayacademyzone.co.uk
- [Make a Referral](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/referral): Referral form for schools, Local Authorities, social workers, and parents.
- [News](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/news): Latest news and announcements.
- [FAQs](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/faqs): Frequently asked questions.

## Optional

- [Blog](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/blog): Long-form articles.
- [Policies](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/policies): Public-facing policy library.
- [Careers](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/careers): Open positions and how to apply.
